text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an outing with Agnes Tachyon, we decide to
go for some tea. On our way back to the
academy...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You know... Trainer, I've been thinking this for a
while...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You look quite tired. Are you taking good care of
yourself?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Goodness, what a vague reply.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to head to the laboratory, but you'd
better go get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Like I always say, things are evolving and
changing every day.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What one considers correct today might turn out
the exact opposite tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If you're not careful, you may find yourself
affixed to obsolete knowledge.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Understand?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In other words, body modification is not about
obtaining makeshift power, but the pursuit of
potential...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, remember that one student
who came to me asking for some miracle potion
of speed?

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Please! Can I have some?! I... want to become
faster!

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm always losing... so I don't care if I cheat
anymore!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It makes me wonder... Do you understand the
significance of the research I am doing... the
reason behind my experimentation?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's researching how to overcome the limits of
Umamusume-kind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a pursuit of boundless possibilities—a journey
to realize untapped potential.
choice_data_list: Is it proof of your conviction?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh! Good answer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My research! My experiments! These are just a
fraction of the potential paths to my goal!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad that my guinea pig has been able to
grasp this. Keep up your good work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly, my body begins to sway unsteadily.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, what happened? Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon's voice is distant. My whole body
loses its strength... and I collapse on the spot.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ah, you've come back.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In the dorm lobby. Don't worry, I got permission
to bring you in here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems Agnes Tachyon carried me here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm able to move again, but a sudden wave of
fatigue hits me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just as I thought... I should have urged you to go
home as soon as I noticed you weren't feeling
well.
choice_data_list: I was just a little tired.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, you are a highly valuable test subject,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'd be in some trouble if you were no longer fit for
the purpose.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I want you to take your role seriously and start
paying closer attention to your health.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words are the same as always, but this time, I
feel that her words are coming from a place of
appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Really? You know, you still look pale.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems so worried, I wonder if a joke will cheer
her up.
choice_data_list: In that case, you got anything that'd cure me?
In that case, you got anything that'd cure me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Mhm... I see. Very, very interesting. I like what I'm
hearing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Wonderful! That's a delightful change of heart! I do love a cooperative guinea pig!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just leave it to me! Whether it's nourishment or a
blast of energy, I can promise you the results you
desire!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If the effects seem a bit extra, just consider it a
bonus.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems I cheered her up a bit too much.
